description: Create the complete GagansModel_EA.mq5 file implementing the T-Spot trading model with all specified logic: HTF candle tracking, T-Spot detection (6 patterns with logarithmic midpoint), FVG-based stop loss, CISD projection targets, state machine position management, invalidation logic, and dashboard.
steps: Create /projects/sandbox/Claude/GagansModel_EA.mq5 as a single complete file
File header with copyright, version, strict property - match GaganEA_v3.mq5 style
Include Trade/Trade.mqh and Trade/PositionInfo.mqh, declare CTrade trade and CPositionInfo posInfo globals
Implement all input parameters in groups: HTF & Detection, Entry & SL, Risk Management, Profit Management, System - exactly as specified in requirements

Global variables: pip/point_size, state machine enum (STATE_NONE=0, STATE_PENDING=1, STATE_FULL=2, STATE_PARTIAL=3, STATE_TRAILING=4), T-Spot tracking vars (direction, midline, entry_price, sl_price, projection levels array[5]), HTF tracking (last_htf_time), order/position tickets
OnInit: calculate pip/point_size, set trade magic/deviation/filling, create dashboard if enabled, print init message
OnDeinit: clean up dashboard objects
OnTick main flow: (1) check for new HTF candle close, (2) run state machine logic every tick, (3) update dashboard
HTF candle tracking: use CopyRates with HTF_Timeframe to get last 5 candles, detect new candle by comparing rates[0].time to last_htf_time
Logarithmic midpoint function: LogMidpoint(high, low, open, close) implementing the exact formula from requirements using MathLog/MathExp
Swept-both invalidation filter function: checks if last_closed swept both sides of prev_closed and closed inside

T-Spot detection function: runs when new HTF candle detected, checks 6 patterns IN ORDER (stop at first match) using the last 3 closed HTF candles. Patterns: Normal Bearish, Normal Bullish, Expansive Bearish, Expansive Bullish, Pro-Trend Bullish Mid Sweep, Pro-Trend Bearish Mid Sweep
For expansive patterns: implement the additional conditions (close >= midpoint, close >= prev_prev high/low, swept-both-closed-inside check on prev_prev)
Entry logic: on T-Spot detected, calculate entry = LogMidpoint of sweep candle, place Sell Limit (bearish) or Buy Limit (bullish) at that price. Cancel any existing pending order first.

FVG Stop Loss: scan M1 bars within current+previous HTF period for Fair Value Gaps. For sell: find bullish FVG above entry (bar[i].low > bar[i+2].high), SL = bar[i].low + buffer. For buy: find bearish FVG below entry (bar[i].high < bar[i+2].low), SL = bar[i].high - buffer. Fallback to T-Spot extreme + buffer.

CISD Projection calculation: find C2 bar (where swept level was formed), look backward for consecutive same-polarity candles, calculate series_range, find break_price, compute 5 projection levels (0.5, 1.0, 1.5, 2.0, 2.5) from break_price
Position sizing: lot = risk_money / (sl_distance / tick_size * tick_value), clamp to Min_Lot/Max_Lot, normalize with volume step
State machine STATE 0 (No position): on T-Spot detected, place limit order with calculated SL
State machine STATE 1 (Pending): check if filled (transition to STATE 2), check if HTF candle closed without fill (cancel), check invalidation (price closes beyond midline - cancel)

State machine STATE 2 (Full position): monitor vs projection levels, if hits level 2.0 close 70% and move SL to entry + BE_Plus_Pips (transition to STATE 3), check invalidation (bar closes beyond midline - close position)
State machine STATE 3 (Partial closed, BE): monitor vs projection level 2.5, if hits 2.5 activate trailing (transition to STATE 4)
State machine STATE 4 (Trailing): trail SL by Trail_Distance_Pips, for buy only move up never down, for sell only move down never up, position closes when SL hit
Invalidation logic: for bearish T-Spot if M1 bar closes above midline, for bullish if M1 bar closes below midline - cancel order or close position depending on state

Dashboard: top-right panel showing EA name/status, current HTF candle OHLC, T-Spot status (None/Bullish/Bearish), trade state (Waiting/Pending/Open/Trailing), current P&L if in trade, projection levels. Use ObjLbl/ObjRect/ObjLine pattern from GaganEA_v3.mq5 but with CORNER_RIGHT_UPPER
TSpot_Bias input filter: if set to Bullish, only take bullish T-Spots; if Bearish only bearish; if None take both
Order expiry: if Order_Expiry_Bars is 0, expire on next HTF candle close; otherwise expire after N M1 bars
Use_Body_Confirmation input: when true, use candle body (open/close range) for series detection in CISD calculation instead of full range (high/low)
acceptance_criteria: File compiles as valid MQL5 syntax (proper function signatures, types, includes)
All 6 T-Spot detection patterns implemented with correct conditions
Logarithmic midpoint calculation uses MathLog/MathExp correctly
FVG detection scans M1 bars with correct gap logic (3-bar pattern)
State machine has 5 states (0-4) with correct transitions
All input parameters match the specification exactly
Dashboard displays in top-right corner with all required information
Code style matches GaganEA_v3.mq5 (includes, CTrade, input groups, helpers)
Single file with no external dependencies beyond standard Trade includes
Partial close at level 2.0 uses trade.PositionClosePartial()
Trailing stop only moves in favorable direction (never against trade)
Projection levels calculated correctly from CISD break price
verification: Check file is non-trivial (>500 lines): wc -l /projects/sandbox/Claude/GagansModel_EA.mq5
Verify all input groups present: grep -c 'input group' GagansModel_EA.mq5 (expect 5)
Verify T-Spot patterns: grep -c 'Pattern' GagansModel_EA.mq5 (expect 6+ references)
Verify LogMidpoint function exists: grep 'LogMidpoint' GagansModel_EA.mq5
findings: File created at 1402 lines. All verification checks pass: 5 input groups, 26 STATE_ references, 6 Pattern references, 4 LogMidpoint refs, 18 FVG refs, 2 CORNER_RIGHT_UPPER refs. No MQL5 compiler available for full syntax validation but code structure matches GaganEA_v3.mq5 patterns exactly.
